Steps.Description: Switch to Blissey then switch to Metagross Trick
if opponent switches out into Chansey, switch to Chandelure 6x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent switches out into Mantine, switch to Blissey again then switch to the second Metagross and use Stealth Rock. Switch to Chandelure 4x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent switches out into Claydol, use Stealth Rock then switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent switches out into Exeggutor, use Stealth Rock then switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent switches out into Golduck, switch to Blissey and use Stealth Rock
if opponent switches into Exeggutor, switch to Chandelure then switch to the second Metagross Trick. Switch to Chandelure 3x Calm Mind + X.Speed
if opponent switches into Lapras comes out, switch to Poliwrath Belly Drum + X.Speed
if opponent switches out into Lapras, use Stealth Rock
if opponent uses Drill Run, switch to Excadrill 2x Swords Dance + X.Speed
if opponent uses Waterfall, switch to Poliwrath Belly Drum + X.Speed
if opponent switches out into Lucario, switch to Chandelure 5x Calm Mind + X.Speed
